description: Compile each verified pair into two simultaneously playable world branches.

effects.playable_result: Spawns adjacent portals from one shared base-state chamber.
Applies the declared operation only beyond the treatment portal.
Highlights changed state leaves after both branches replay identical steps.

world_effects.completion: Players traverse both branches and inspect the verified contrast.
world_effects.failure: A hash mismatch closes both portals without mutating source worlds.
world_effects.interaction: Replay, compare, inspect intervention, and verify state hashes.
world_effects.spawn: A Multiverse Fork appears in an isolated projection world.
